'''Karka''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who served aboard the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']]. Frequently seen in the presence of fellow pilots [[Dontal]] and [[Misch'an]], Karka's absence was noted by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] after the pilot was killed in the [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brigia]] during [[Operation Strike Fear]].
